summary: Made surgical continuity edits to connect the chapter 7 debrief promise into Lucien's questioning, align the reserve-drop assignment with chapter 9's cache keeper, and tighten the dawn handoff into the next chapter.
edits: Added a brief acknowledgment that Elise already gave Lucien her account of how the room went bad.
Changed the reserve destination from a conflicting coal-box cache to the woman over the mourning-ribbon shop.
Adjusted the closing dawn handoff so Clemence presses the washing bundle on Elise before dawn.
